name: Disenchantment rpg
description:
This is a disenchantment RPG

__________info___________

Welcome to the kingdom of Dreamland. You have been caught by a guard stealing, so they have brought you into the king's court. You now face King Zog. When you arrived, Princess Bean was on her throne looking bored out of her mind. A small black catlike demon, named Luci, was bothering her. A green elf, 3 feet tall at most, was next to Bean, glancing at her every so often. They must be her friends
